privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openvsp_wet_wing_fuel_volume. Verified that the task uses the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual transport model. Confirmed that the expected U and W bounding parameters, along with the Jet-A fuel density (804 kg/m^3) and result file path, exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description, setup/export scripts, and the verifier.py logic.
